creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

As suggested in another PR from you, please go to 
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions, add 
yourself to the mailinglist and ask your question there first, you are 
not having a problem at the moment, you have a question, I am sure 
people will help you there (probably quicker there then on this PR 
ticket). Thanks for using  FreeBSD and trying to improve it together 
with us!
